title: Chess → Music
desc: A full two-player chess game whose board is a sequencer. Legal moves, check/mate/stalemate, auto-promotion. A play-head sweeps the files voicing each piece (rank=octave, file=pentatonic degree); moves accent, captures thud, and a bass note tracks the material balance — the position IS the melody.

title: Auto-Blur Faces
desc: Privacy filter — MediaPipe face tracking + dynamic masking blurs every face in the camera feed. Sharp base plus a blurred layer masked to the face ovals (vision.faceMask, up to 5 faces).

title: Finger-Frame ASCII
desc: Make a rectangle with two hands — the director's-frame gesture — and the framed area turns to green-on-black ASCII while everything outside stays sharp. Hand skeleton drawn on top (vision.handRectMask + pipe.ascii).

title: Watch Your Mouth
desc: Say a curse word and your head goes boom (non-gory) — speech-to-text feeds lang.isProfane, vision finds your head, a cartoon fireball hides it then it grows back.

title: Plasma Shader
desc: Animated GLSL fragment shader — rainbow plasma effect driven by time

title: Bouncing Circles
desc: Canvas animation using the draw API — colorful physics balls

title: Spiral Trail
desc: Lissajous-style spiral with glowing trails on the canvas

title: Reactive Ripples
desc: Beat-driven interference rings — showcases on/any/every/when event bus modifiers

title: Gaze Garden
desc: Eye-tracking brush — calibrate gaze, then paint by looking; wink to burst, blink to flash

title: Billiards
desc: Fling the cue ball to break the rack — window-scoped Canvas with pre-mapped pointer, elastic ball + rail collisions, impact-scaled sounds

title: Hand Pong
desc: Your hands are the paddles — webcam + hand tracking. Invisible skeleton bats the ball; swing for speed, rotate your hand for spin (Magnus curve). Two-handed.

title: Finger Guns
desc: Make a finger-gun, drop the thumb to fire — self-calibrating two-hand gesture detection triggers a noise burst. Camera + vision + audio via pipe.

title: Karaoke
desc: Speak and your words bloom in random colors over your camera feed — speech-to-text drives floating text.

title: Traffic → Music
desc: BYO traffic video — a trip line across the road turns each lane into a note as vehicles cross. Orientation auto-detects (head-on or side view). After Jarbas Agnelli.
